{{nihongo|'''Yokihikono Shrine'''|御門主比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Noto Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Yokihikono Shrine'''|御門主比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Noto Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Yokihikono Shrine
| native_name = 御門主比古神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Yokihikono Shrine

{{nihongo|'''Yokihikono Shrine'''|御門主比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Noto Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Yokihikono Shrine'''|御門主比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Noto Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Yokihikono Shrine'''|御門主比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Noto Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Yokihikono Shrine | native_name = 御門主比古神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Yokihikono Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|36.935617|136.8581}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Yokihikono Shrine'''|御門主比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Noto Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==
